## Checklist

<!-- Complete all items before requesting review -->

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid YAML frontmatter (`name`, `description`, `triggers`)
- [ ] `name` in frontmatter matches the skill directory name
- [ ] Content after frontmatter is non-empty and substantive
- [ ] Tested locally — skill installs and activates correctly
- [ ] No sensitive data included (API keys, credentials, personal info)
